prompt: What is the execution order of JUnit 5 lifecycle methods in this test class?
answer:
beforeAll
beforeEach
test1
afterEach
beforeEach
test2
afterEach
afterAll
explanation: @BeforeAll runs once at start. @AfterAll runs once at end. @BeforeEach and @AfterEach wrap each individual test method. (Assuming test1 runs before test2.)
alternatives:
beforeAll
beforeEach
test1
afterEach
beforeEach
test2
afterEach
afterAll
